utterances.speaker: Older Scientist
utterances.text: Dr . Geller , there is a seat over here .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Thank you , Dr . Phillips , but I am having my lunch at this table , here in the middle .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I am having lunch right here , with my good friend Joey , if he will sit with me .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I will sit with you Dr . Geller .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: You know , we work in a museum of natural history , and yet there is something unnatural about the way we eat lunch .

emotion_cause.span: 5_there is something unnatural about the way we eat lunch .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Now , I look around this cafeteria , and you know what I see , I see ... I see division .

emotion_cause.span: 7_Division , between people in white coats and people in blue blazers

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Division , between people in white coats and people in blue blazers , and I ask myself , " My God why ? ! "

emotion_cause.span: 7_Division , between people in white coats and people in blue blazers

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Now , I say we shed these ... these coats that separate us , and we get to know the people underneath .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I am Ross !

emotion_cause.span: 10_I am divorced , and I have a kid !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I am divorced , and I have a kid !

emotion_cause.span: 10_I am divorced , and I have a kid !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I am Joey ! I am an actor ! I do not know squat about dinosaurs !

emotion_cause.span: 11_I do not know squat about dinosaurs !

utterances.speaker: Another Tour Guide
utterances.text: I am Ted , and I just moved here a month ago , and New York really scares me .

emotion_cause.span: 12_I just moved here a month ago , and New York really scares me .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: All right , there you go !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Yeah , you hang in there Teddy !

utterances.speaker: Older Scientist
utterances.text: I am Andrew , and I did not pay for this pear .

emotion_cause.span: 15_I did not pay for this pear .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Okay , good ... good for you .

utterances.speaker: Tour Guide
utterances.text: I am Rhonda , and these are not real !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Wow , Rhonda .

utterances.speaker: Another Scientist
utterances.text: I am Scott .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yeah , okay , Scott !

utterances.speaker: Another Scientist
utterances.text: And I need to flip the light switch on and off 17 times before I leave a room or my family will die .

emotion_cause.span: 21_I need to flip the light switch on and off 17 times before I leave a room or my family will die .
